block_00: Account satyaapan ke liye dastaavej upload karen
block_01: Apne account ko satyaapit karne ke liye, hum aapse apne passport ke mukhya prishthon ki ek spasht rangeen prati ya ek ID ke donon side ki ek prati upload karne ke liye kahte hain. Dastaavej maanya hona chaahiye aur nimn jaanakari spasht rup se dikhaai deni chahiye:
block_08: Kripya sveekrit dastaavejon ke prakaaron ke udaaharan dekhen aur dekhen ki unhen kaise upload kiya jaana chahiye. Aap neeche diye gaye link par clik karke apna dastaavej upload kar sakte hain.
block_10: Yadi aapko sahaayata ki aavashyakta hai ya aapke paas koi prashn hain, to kripya bejhijhak humare
